page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369HB processors running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high clock speed provide a high-density compute profile suitable for CPU-bound workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading.

Given the high core count, dedicated CPU allocation, and 2.0 GB per core memory ratio, this instance is designed for compute-intensive tasks. Appropriate workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, intensive scientific simulations, and compute-heavy application hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.24xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369HB processors operating at 3.3 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration. The instance provides 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for high-density compute workloads, offering qualitative cost efficiency for tasks requiring dedicated, non-shared CPU resources. The server is suited for compute-intensive applications, batch processing, and high-performance computing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.24xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.3 GHz, 192 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance workloads.

tagline: A high-frequency, compute-optimized server featuring ninety-six dedicated processor cores and thirty-two gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
192.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
No bundled local storage or integrated GPU accelerators
Optimized for compute-heavy workloads, batch processing, and scientific simulations
